item.description: President Donald Trump says “Project Freedom,” his newly minted military operation to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz and break an Iranian blockade, is suspended one day after it began. Trump said the pause will help diplomatic talks to end the war brokered by Pakistan. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Trump Suspends Military Escorts in Hormuz 1 Day Into Operation
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump says “Project Freedom,” his newly minted military operation to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz and break an Iranian blockade, is suspended one day after it began. Trump said the pause will help diplomatic talks to end the war brokered by Pakistan. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: Trump Suspends Military Escorts in Hormuz 1 Day Into Operation

item.description: NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races across Ohio and Indiana, including wins for Vivek Ramaswamy in the Republican governor’s race in Ohio and Sherrod Brown winning the Democratic Senate primary in his fight to regain the seat he lost in 2024, and how the races have been a test of the impact of nationwide redistricting efforts.

media:content.media:title: Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races in Ohio, Indiana
media:content.media:description: NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races across Ohio and Indiana, including wins for Vivek Ramaswamy in the Republican governor’s race in Ohio and Sherrod Brown winning the Democratic Senate primary in his fight to regain the seat he lost in 2024, and how the races have been a test of the impact of nationwide redistricting efforts.

item.title: Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races in Ohio, Indiana

item.description: Overnight results from a number of key primary races in the Midwest are being seen as a major test of President Donald Trump’s hold on the Republican base as his party fights to keep control of Congress. In Indiana, a majority of incumbent Republican state senators who faced Trump-backed challengers lost their races. The incumbents were targeted by the president after they voted against his call to change the state's congressional map, a move that would've created two additional GOP-friendly s

media:content.media:title: Trump-Backed Candidates Win Big in Midwest Primaries
media:content.media:description: Overnight results from a number of key primary races in the Midwest are being seen as a major test of President Donald Trump’s hold on the Republican base as his party fights to keep control of Congress. In Indiana, a majority of incumbent Republican state senators who faced Trump-backed challengers lost their races. The incumbents were targeted by the president after they voted against his call to change the state's congressional map, a move that would've created two additional GOP-friendly seats in November's midterm elections. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports for TODAY.

item.title: Trump-Backed Candidates Win Big in Midwest Primaries

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber and notching a Democratic win in a key battleground state.

media:content.media:description: Democrat Chedrick Greene defeated Republican Jason Tunney in a special election for a Michigan state Senate seat.
Democrat Chedrick Greene defeated Republican Jason Tunney in a special election for a Michigan state Senate seat.

item.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won Ohio’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects, advancing to what could be an expensive and competitive general election with Democrat Amy Acton in a state that has been brutal for Democrats in recent elections.

media:content.media:description: Republican Ohio gubernatorial candidate Vivek speaks during a watch party at the Spruce St. Sporting sports bar after winning the party's nomination for governor Tuesday, May 5, 2026, in Columbus.

item.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP nomination for governor in Ohio

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Former Sen. Sherrod Brown has won the Democratic nomination in Ohio’s special Senate election, NBC News projects, paving the way for a nationally watched general election matchup against Republican incumbent Jon Husted

media:content.media:description: Democratic Ohio Senate candidate Sherrod Brown, a former three-term U.S. senator, speaks at a primary election night campaign event after winning the party's primary for US Senate in Cleveland, Tuesday, May 5, 2026.

item.title: Sherrod Brown wins Democratic Senate nomination in Ohio, setting up a key battleground race

item.description: Ted Turner, the billionaire entrepreneur and philanthropist who was a founder of CNN, has died at 87. NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports on his work and legacy.

media:content.media:title: CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87
media:content.media:description: Ted Turner, the billionaire entrepreneur and philanthropist who was a founder of CNN, has died at 87. NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports on his work and legacy.

item.title: CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87

item.description: Three passengers suspected of being infected with Hantavirus have been evacuated from the cruise ship in the Atlantic and are on the way to get medical care. The World Health Organization has announced there are now eight cases of the virus stemming from the cluster onboard, where three have died. Now, the ship is headed to Spain's Canary Islands where it will dock, as global concerns grow about the spread. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Sick Passengers Evacuated From Hantavirus-Plagued Cruise
media:content.media:description: Three passengers suspected of being infected with Hantavirus have been evacuated from the cruise ship in the Atlantic and are on the way to get medical care. The World Health Organization has announced there are now eight cases of the virus stemming from the cluster onboard, where three have died. Now, the ship is headed to Spain's Canary Islands where it will dock, as global concerns grow about the spread. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

item.title: Sick Passengers Evacuated From Hantavirus-Plagued Cruise

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: TK Trump ally Farage on cusp of smashing Labour in deprived Welsh towns with hard-right, anti-immigration message

media:content.media:credit: Francesca Jones for NBC News; Ben Birchall/PA via Alamy
media:content.media:text: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:credit: Francesca Jones for NBC News; Ben Birchall/PA via Alamy
media:content.media:text: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:credit: Francesca Jones for NBC News; Ben Birchall/PA via Alamy
media:content.media:text: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: Reform UK Enter Final Week Of Welsh Election Campaigning With Visit To Merthyr Tydfil
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.
Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: Above: Artwork in Merthyr Tydfil as part of a wider town regeneration. Below: Shuttered stores in the town center on Monday.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: Sam Lewis, 37, a carer for her mother said she was voting for Reform.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: Janis Casault at the Cwmcelyn nature reserve in Blaina, Wales, on Monday.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: Jason O'Connell, Reform candidate for Pontypridd Cynon Merthyr constituency.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: Antipathy with the mainstream parties means many people will ignore the election altogether. "I'm not going to vote for any of them," said Craig Rhys, 37, a drywall installer from Merthyr's Gurnos neighborhood. "They are all full of s---."
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

media:content.media:text: The Gurnos housing estate in Merthyr Tydfil.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK, led by Trump ally Nigel Farage, is projected to make sweeping gains in thousands of local municipal races across Britain.

item.title: A hard-right Trump ally seeks liftoff in forgotten Britain

item.dc:creator: Erik Ortiz
item.description: Howard Lutnick said he stopped talking to Jeffrey Epstein in 2005. But a House inquiry wants to know why investigatory files show otherwise.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Spends Weekend At His Mar-a-Lago Resort In Florida
media:content.media:description: Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick aboard Air Force One on Feb. 6, 2026 en route to Palm Beach, Fla.

item.title: Howard Lutnick faces congressional showdown after Epstein files revealed island visit

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: A new lawsuit filed against filmmaker James Cameron and The Walt Disney Company alleges that Cameron used the facial features of a then-14-year-old actress as the basis for one of the main characters in the “Avatar” films.

media:content.media:text: A complaint by actress Q’orianka Kilcher alleges director James Cameron used her likeness for the movie "Avatar".
media:content.media:description: A complaint by actress Q’orianka Kilcher alleges director James Cameron used her likeness for the movie "Avatar."

media:content.media:text: Court evidence which includes an original "Avatar" sketch made by director James Cameron.
media:content.media:description: A complaint by actress Q’orianka Kilcher alleges director James Cameron used her likeness for the movie "Avatar."

item.title: Actor alleges James Cameron used her teenage face to create key 'Avatar' character
